article_summary.lore: Naga sea witch from Hatecoil nobility, favored by Queen Azshara; uses waves and skies against enemies.
article_summary.unlock_or_shielding: Protected by Arcane Shielding from Hatecoil Arcanists on the path to her beach.
article_summary.encounter_shape: Primarily single-target, moderate movement/awareness, shallow tide pool with Sand Dunes used as terrain mechanic.

encounter_journal.overview: Lady Hatecoil uses storms and lightning; Static Nova punishes players touching water and Focused Lightning can blow away sand dunes.

dps: Move onto a sand dune to avoid Static Nova.
Move away from sand dunes when Focused Lightning strikes to prevent it from destroying them.
healer: Move onto a sand dune to avoid Static Nova.
Move away from sand dunes when Focused Lightning strikes to prevent it from destroying them.
tank: Move onto a sand dune to avoid Static Nova.
Move away from sand dunes when Focused Lightning strikes to prevent it from destroying them.
Gain threat on loose Saltsea Globules when Lady Hatecoil casts Beckon Storm.

abilities.name: Static Nova
abilities.notes: Electrifies the surrounding water. Players touching water take Nature damage and may be stunned. Sand dunes are the intended safe area.

abilities.name: Focused Lightning
abilities.notes: Targets all players with a focused lightning strike. Can destroy nearby sand dunes.

abilities.name: Excess Lightning
abilities.notes: Released by players struck by Focused Lightning; deals nearby Nature damage and can destroy sand dunes.

abilities.name: Watery Splash
abilities.notes: Saltsea Globule death effect; deals Frost damage within 5 yards and slows affected players.

abilities.name: Curse of the Witch
abilities.notes: Magic curse; when removed or expired, releases frontal cone Arcane blast, knockback and destroys lesser creatures.

abilities.name: Monsoon
abilities.notes: Heroic/Mythic/Timewalking flagged in journal; follows nearest targets, knocks players up and can blow away sand dunes.

abilities.name: Crackling Thunder
abilities.notes: Punishes players who leave the arena; Nature damage and stacking increased damage taken.

drop_table_summary.note: Rows are from the boss page listview and still include noise; source/type must be normalized later.

curated_route_and_mechanics_notes: Boss page confirms Lady Hatecoil is in Eye of Azshara with map pin 45.9, 50.0.
Article text says Lady Hatecoil is protected by Arcane Shielding provided by four Hatecoil Arcanists positioned around the path leading to her beach.
User comments indicate practical unlock may require killing two or three nearby Hatecoil Arcanists; this conflicts with the article text and should be treated as a route note needing verification.
Fight is primarily single-target with moderate movement/awareness in a shallow tide pool with Sand Dunes.
Static Nova safe area should be sand dunes; a user comment notes that nearby rocks do not count as 'land'.
Drops table includes 126 rows on the boss page; this includes gear-like items plus non-gear/quest/currency/noise and must be normalized before boss-to-upgrade advice.
normalization_todo: Split boss-specific gear drops from zone drops and noisy rows.
Resolve numeric mode codes into normal/heroic/mythic/mythic+/timewalking.
Confirm exact number and NPC IDs of Hatecoil Arcanists required to remove Arcane Shielding.
Map item IDs to slot/armor/weapon text using item pages or Blizzard API.
Model item-level scaling separately from stable item identity.
